content.text:
That it's just... who I am now. That I used the better version of myself up somewhere along the way and this is what's left.

I've done the work, you know? Therapy, meditation, the journaling. I'm not someone who avoids this stuff. I've processed things. So if I'm still here, still flat -- I don't know what that means. Maybe there's nothing more to find. Maybe this is just the baseline and I need to accept it.

I'm not sure if that's wisdom or resignation. I genuinely can't tell anymore.
